case_title: SF 685 GEARY STREET, LLC VS. TIMOTHY DESIR ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DANIEL R. STERN, ESQ. RE COPY OF LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SF 685 GEARY STREET, LLC
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SF 685 GEARY STREET, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DESIR, TIMOTHY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SF 685 GEARY STREET, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DESIR, TIMOTHY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 685 GEARY STREET #502, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, LEASE FORFEITED, INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
